Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS "__cs_agg" FROM "public"."user_departments" "faggt0" WHERE "faggt0"."department_id" = "public"."departments"."id" AND "faggt0"."department_id" = ANY($1::uuid[])) "faggs0" WHERE "faggs0"."__cs_agg" > $2::integer) AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($3::uuid[]) ORDER BY "name" ASC) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
